
# Did Consciousness Enable Life?

## Chapter Purpose

Discuss theories proposing that consciousness or information may have participated in the emergence and organization of life.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
